ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the model was trained */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the model */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last updated the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the data belongs to */,
  "timestep" INTEGER /* Timestep of the data */,
  "avg_action_dist" TEXT /* Average action distribution */,
  "actions" TEXT /* Actions taken */,
  "rewards" REAL /* Rewards received */,
  "original_rewards" REAL /* Original rewards received */,
  "obs" TEXT /* Observations */,
  "human_obs" TEXT /* Human observations */,
  "logstd_action_dist" TEXT /* Log standard deviation of action distribution */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of training data (e.g., images, text, audio) */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the training data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, loss) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation metric was calculated */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation metric (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., admin, contributor, viewer) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher (e.g., university, organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who interacted with the model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model interacted with */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., trained, evaluated) */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the interaction */,
  "interaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the interaction (e.g., in-progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_interactions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_interactions_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shared model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shared model */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who shared the model */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date the model was shared */,
  "share_type" TEXT /* Type of sharing (e.g., public, private, collaborative) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* IDs of researchers the model is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_sharing_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_sharing_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shared data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shared data */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who shared the data */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date the data was shared */,
  "share_type" TEXT /* Type of sharing (e.g., public, private, collaborative) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* IDs of researchers the data is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES training_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who has the permission */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the permission is for */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "permission_granted_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was granted */,
  "permission_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_permissions_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_permissions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_changelog" TEXT /* Changelog of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who interacted with the version */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version interacted with */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., trained, evaluated) */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the interaction */,
  "interaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the interaction (e.g., in-progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_interactions_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_interactions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shared version */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shared version */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who shared the version */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date the version was shared */,
  "share_type" TEXT /* Type of sharing (e.g., public, private, collaborative) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* IDs of researchers the version is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_sharing_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_sharing_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)
